title: mserver5: gdk_bat.c:2855: BATassertHeadProps: Assertion `!b->H->revsorted || cmp >= 0' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE FLOAT8_TBL(f1 DOUBLE, f2 FLOAT, f3 FLOAT CHECK (f3 >= 0));
INSERT INTO FLOAT8_TBL(f1, f2, f3) VALUES (1.2345678901234e+200, 1.5, 1);
INSERT INTO FLOAT8_TBL(f1, f2, f3) VALUES (1.2345678901234e-200, NULL, 2);
SELECT f1, f2, ROUND(f1, 2) AS rounded_f1 FROM FLOAT8_TBL WHERE f3 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(f1) AS avg_f1, MAX(f2) AS max_f2 FROM FLOAT8_TBL;
key_bug_features: Assertion failure during floating-point rounding operation
